title: System Design
description: A full system-design course — fundamentals (networking, protocols, architecture, scalability, storage, performance, reliability, security) through end-to-end designs of real systems like TinyURL, YouTube, Uber, and Google Drive. Diagram-heavy.
tagline: From the fundamentals to cracking interviews — networking, scalability, storage, performance, and security, plus eight real-world system designs.
learn: Reason about latency, throughput, and trade-offs intuitively
Apply a repeatable framework to any design problem
Choose between monolith, microservices, and event-driven designs
Design real systems: YouTube, Uber, Google Docs, and more
Recognize anti-patterns before they cost you
